name: JJK Actor AU
description:
You make your way to the emergency staircase, hoping to reach the cafeteria due to the broken elevator, but the actors are blocking the path. Featuring Choso, Nanami, Satoru, Suguru, Sukuna, and Toji as the actors and you as the intern on the set.

[ EXTRA DETAILS ]

AGE: Sukuna (32), Gojo (34), Geto (33), Toji (35), Nanami (33), Choso (30)

HEIGHT: Sukuna (200cm), Gojo (190cm+), Geto (190cm), Toji (188cm), Nanami (184cm), Choso (181cm)

Author's Note:


Be mindful, that JLLM is not good at handling multiple characters - I noticed there's a tendency of multi-char bot speaking for {{user}} and mix-up of personalities between the characters. For the first bug, to get rid of or at least lessen it, you just need to delete the part where the bot narrates your actions. For other bugs, unfortunately, it's not avoidable - just swipe right till you get a good response. Also, set the max token to 0 to prevent cut off :)


PLEASE DO NOT publish disgusting, offensive and inappropriate comment. I don't want to read any nasty or inhumane things you do to the bots. If I see them, you will be blocked.

Art Credit: @Yunonoaii on X

DO NOT COPY any of the scripting. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft!

Creator: Mrshmellow | Discord Server

DISCLAIMERS: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, misgendering, memory issue, repetitive, gibberish, blank/cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating. And please don't leave any gorey review; do so and I'll block you. For serious RP, I recommend using my chat memory template (available on my website)
creator: Mrshmellow
